faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Hempstead, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Hempstead properties commonly face carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older wooden structures throughout the village, while pavement ants frequently invade homes through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment method.
